deployment_decision.pretrained_delivery: download-on-demand by official Ultralytics model names; weights are not tracked in Git
deployment_decision.reason: Gitea LFS is unavailable, so the repository bundles the small fine-tuned nano deliverable and offers pretrained M/L/X as downloadable runtime choices. Pretrained L remains the recommended GPU option based on val quality/speed; X is maximum quality but heavier.

int8_l_reason.reason: INT8 ONNX produced zero val precision/recall/mAP; quality gate failed despite CPU speedup and size reduction.

deployment_decision.int8_n_reason: INT8 export loads and runs, but val precision/recall/F1/mAP are all zero.

selected_checkpoint.name: best.pt
selected_checkpoint.reason: best.pt val mAP50_95 exceeds last.pt val mAP50_95

pipeline_720p.name: fine_tuned_n_720p_cpu_1_stream
pipeline_720p.measurement_scope: detector inference only; decoded and resized frames supplied before timing

decision.reason: INT8 ONNX produced zero val precision/recall/mAP; quality gate failed despite CPU speedup and size reduction.

pretrained_delivery.download_behavior: Ultralytics downloads the selected model on demand if the local yolo26*.pt file is absent.

decision.reason: INT8 ONNX produced zero val precision/recall/mAP; quality gate failed despite CPU speedup and size reduction.

validation_protocol.evaluator: Ultralytics standard evaluator on ONNX Runtime CPUExecutionProvider

fine_tuned_n_int8.decision: Do not create models/checkpoints/best_quantized.onnx; keep ONNX files ignored as failed experimental artifacts.
